components.buttonsBody: Reusable actions with size and variant controls.

help.title: Luck Trend
help.body: The luck trend chart shows how your fortune score changes month by month. Tap any month to see the score and a brief reading for that period.

help.title: Monthly Overview
help.body: A summary of the month's energy and how it interacts with your personal BaZi chart. This gives you the overall theme and tone for the month ahead.

help.title: Luck & Avoid
help.body: A summary of the activities, directions, and choices most aligned with this month's energy (Luck) and those best avoided (Avoid).

help.title: Fortune Hints
help.body: Practical guidance for the month: your lucky colour, lucky number, and the active and weak elements. Use these to align your choices with the month's energy.

domains.title: Life domains
domains.locked: Premium required to reveal this insight.

help.title: Life Domains
help.body: The six life domains — Career, Wealth, Relationship, Health, Study, and Family — each receive a different level of activation from the month's energy. Premium unlocks the full analysis.

help.title: Day Master × Month
help.body: This section shows how your Day Master element interacts with the current month's Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch. The interaction type (e.g. producing, controlling) shapes the month's dominant themes.

help.title: Protection
help.body: A personalised strategy to protect your energy and mitigate challenging influences this month. Based on your Day Master and the month's elemental interactions.

help.title: Day Master
help.body: Your Day Master is the Heavenly Stem of your Day Pillar. It represents your core self, personality, and the lens through which you experience the world.

help.title: Destiny Features
help.body: Each feature reveals a different dimension of your BaZi chart — from daily guidance to long-term luck cycles.

chart.subtitle: The Blueprint of Your Destiny
chart.strongestElement: Your chart shows {element} as the strongest element ({score}), indicating a dominant influence in your life path.
chart.weakestElement: Conversely, {element} is the weakest ({score}), suggesting areas where you may need to cultivate balance and awareness.

glossary.dayMaster: The Heavenly Stem of your birth day, representing your core self and personality.
glossary.heavenlyStem: One of the 10 celestial stems in Chinese astrology, representing yang energy.
glossary.earthlyBranch: One of the 12 terrestrial branches in Chinese astrology, representing yin energy.
glossary.tenGod: The relationship between your Day Master and other stems, indicating life aspects.
glossary.pillar: A combination of Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch representing a time period.
glossary.fiveElements: Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water - the fundamental energies in Bazi.
glossary.luckPillar: 10-year cycles that influence your fortune throughout life.

yearly.title: Annual Forecast
yearly.subtitle: Your Year Ahead

zodiacPosition.head: Head of Year
zodiacPosition.headDesc: Born in the opening phase of this zodiac year.
zodiacPosition.middleDesc: Born in the peak phase of this zodiac year.
zodiacPosition.tailDesc: Born in the closing phase of this zodiac year.

yearly.monthlyChartHint: Tap a month to see details

dayMaster.title: Day Master
dayMaster.body: Your Day Master (日主) is the Heavenly Stem of your Day Pillar — the central element that represents your core self in BaZi. It defines your fundamental nature, how you process experiences, and how you relate to the world. All other elements in your chart are interpreted in relation to your Day Master through the Ten God system. Knowing your Day Master is the starting point for all BaZi analysis.

info.fourPillars: The Four Pillars (Year, Month, Day, Hour) are the foundation of your Bazi chart. Each pillar contains a Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch, encoding the energy of the moment you were born. Together they reveal your destiny blueprint.

elementBalance.title: Element Balance
elementBalance.body: The Five Elements — Wood (木), Fire (火), Earth (土), Metal (金), and Water (水) — are the building blocks of BaZi analysis. Your chart's element balance shows which elements are strong (present in multiple pillars) and which are weak or absent. A balanced chart has all five elements present. Strong elements represent your dominant traits and resources; weak elements represent areas that may need support or attention.

luckPillars.title: Luck Pillars
luckPillars.body: Luck Pillars are 10-year cycles that activate different parts of your Bazi chart. Each pillar brings a new Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch that interacts with your birth chart, shaping the dominant themes of that decade.

info.currentLuckPillar: Your current Luck Pillar is the 10-year cycle you are living through right now. The Heavenly Stem acts on your upper chart (mind, career, relationships) while the Earthly Branch acts on your lower chart (body, resources, foundations).

tenGods.title: Ten Gods
tenGods.body: The Ten Gods (十神) are the ten possible relationships between any element and your Day Master, based on the Five Element cycle (producing, controlling, and their variations). They include: Direct Wealth, Indirect Wealth, Direct Officer, Seven Killings, Direct Resource, Indirect Resource, Eating God, Hurting Officer, Friend, and Rob Wealth. Each Ten God represents a different aspect of life — career, relationships, resources, creativity, and more.

info.tenGod_friend: Friend (比肩): Same element, same polarity as your Day Master. Represents peers, siblings, and competition. Brings solidarity and rivalry.
info.tenGod_robWealth: Rob Wealth (劫財): Same element, opposite polarity. Represents rivals who take what is yours. Can also bring bold, decisive energy.
info.tenGod_eatingGod: Eating God (食神): The element your Day Master produces, same polarity. Represents creativity, enjoyment, talent, and nurturing. A positive star.
info.tenGod_hurtingOfficer: Hurting Officer (傷官): The element your Day Master produces, opposite polarity. Represents unconventional thinking, rebellion, and brilliance. Powerful but needs direction.
info.tenGod_directWealth: Direct Wealth (正財): The element your Day Master controls, opposite polarity. Represents stable income, discipline, and earned resources.
info.tenGod_indirectWealth: Indirect Wealth (偏財): The element your Day Master controls, same polarity. Represents windfall, investment, and the father figure.
info.tenGod_directOfficer: Direct Officer (正官): The element that controls your Day Master, opposite polarity. Represents authority, structure, and the spouse (for women). A star of responsibility.
info.tenGod_sevenKillings: Seven Killings (七殺): The element that controls your Day Master, same polarity. Represents pressure, power, and transformation. Can be a star of great achievement or great challenge.
info.tenGod_directResource: Direct Resource (正印): The element that produces your Day Master, opposite polarity. Represents support, learning, and the mother figure. A nurturing star.
info.tenGod_indirectResource: Indirect Resource (偏印): The element that produces your Day Master, same polarity. Represents unconventional knowledge, intuition, and independence.
info.zodiacPosition: The zodiac year is divided into three phases — Head (months 1–4), Middle (months 5–8), and Tail (months 9–12). Your birth month determines which phase you belong to, influencing how you experience the energy of your zodiac year.
info.firstHalfLuck: The first half of the year (roughly January to June) is governed by the Heavenly Stem of the annual pillar. This period tends to affect your mind, career, and outward actions.
info.secondHalfLuck: The second half of the year (roughly July to December) is governed by the Earthly Branch of the annual pillar. This period tends to affect your body, relationships, and inner resources.
info.annualFlow: The Annual Flow describes how the current year's energy interacts with your personal Bazi chart. It reveals which life domains are activated, what opportunities arise, and what challenges to navigate.

monthlyFlow.title: Monthly Flow
monthlyFlow.body: The Monthly Flow (流月) shows how each month's Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch interact with your personal chart. Monthly pillars create short-term elemental influences that can amplify or challenge your natal chart's energy. Strong months bring opportunities and ease; challenging months require more caution and effort. The Monthly Flow is the most granular level of BaZi timing analysis.

wisdomStar.title: Wisdom Star (文昌)
wisdomStar.body: The Wisdom Star (文昌) appears when specific Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches align in your natal chart or the current year's pillar. It enhances learning ability, exam luck, intellectual clarity, and creative thinking. People with a strong Wisdom Star in their chart often excel in academic pursuits, writing, and analytical work. When activated by the year's energy, it is an ideal time to study, take exams, or start creative projects.

romanceStar.title: Romance Star (桃花)
romanceStar.body: The Romance Star (桃花, Peach Blossom) is activated by specific Earthly Branches in your chart or the current year. It attracts romantic energy, social charm, and interpersonal opportunities. A strong Romance Star increases your magnetism and can bring new relationships or deepen existing ones. It also enhances social networking and public appeal. When active, focus on building genuine connections rather than surface-level interactions.

specialInfluence.title: Special Influence Stars
specialInfluence.body: Special Influence Stars are rare configurations that appear when specific elements align in your natal chart and the current year's pillars. They carry significant impact — both positive and challenging. Positive stars can bring breakthroughs, recognition, and unexpected opportunities. Challenging stars may signal periods requiring extra caution, especially in health, finances, or relationships. Understanding these stars helps you prepare and respond wisely.

auspiciousDirection.title: Auspicious Direction
auspiciousDirection.body: Your auspicious direction is determined by your Day Master's element and the current year's energy. Facing or travelling in this direction during important activities — such as job interviews, business meetings, or significant decisions — can support and amplify your personal energy. This is based on the principle that elemental energy flows directionally, and aligning yourself with your favourable direction reduces resistance and increases opportunity.

activityRecommendation.title: Activity Recommendation
activityRecommendation.body: Based on today's elemental energy and how it interacts with your personal chart, certain types of activity are more aligned with the day's natural flow. Outdoor activities, travel, social engagements, or staying home each carry different energy costs and benefits. Following these recommendations helps you work with — rather than against — the day's energy, conserving effort and maximising results.

yinYang.title: Yin & Yang
yinYang.body: Yin (陰) and Yang (陽) are the two fundamental polarities in Chinese metaphysics. Your Day Master is either Yin or Yang, which shapes how you express your element's energy. Yang energy is expressive, outward, and initiating — Yang people tend to be more direct and action-oriented. Yin energy is receptive, inward, and refining — Yin people tend to be more thoughtful and detail-focused. Neither is superior; both are essential and complementary.

compatibility.title: BaZi Compatibility
compatibility.body: BaZi compatibility examines how two people's charts interact at the elemental level. It analyses element clashes and combinations between the four pillars, the Ten God relationships between Day Masters, and the overall elemental balance between the two charts. Strong compatibility suggests natural harmony and mutual support. Challenging interactions highlight areas that require conscious effort and communication. BaZi compatibility is a guide for understanding dynamics, not a verdict on a relationship.

luckPillarGod.title: Luck Pillar Ten God
luckPillarGod.body: The dominant Ten God in your current Luck Pillar shapes the overarching theme of this 10-year period. For example, a Direct Officer (正官) pillar brings themes of structure, authority, and responsibility. A Seven Killings (七殺) pillar brings pressure, transformation, and the need for resilience. A Eating God (食神) pillar favours creativity, enjoyment, and self-expression. Understanding your current Luck Pillar's Ten God helps you align your goals with the decade's dominant energy.

yearlySummary.title: Year at a Glance
yearlySummary.body: A high-level overview of how the current year's energy interacts with your personal BaZi chart. This section shows your zodiac animal for the year, the year's dominant element, and the overall theme for the 12 months ahead. It gives you the big picture before diving into the detailed monthly and domain-level analysis.

yearlyPeriods.title: Year in Three Phases
yearlyPeriods.body: The year is divided into three phases based on seasonal energy shifts: Beginning (Jan–Apr, Spring), Middle (May–Aug, Summer), and End (Sep–Dec, Autumn/Winter). Each phase is governed by different elemental interactions with your chart, creating distinct windows of opportunity and challenge. Understanding which phase you are in helps you time important decisions more effectively.

zodiacReading.title: Zodiac Reading
zodiacReading.body: Your Chinese Zodiac animal is determined by your birth year and follows a 12-year cycle. The zodiac position — Head (頭), Middle (中), or Tail (尾) — indicates which phase of the zodiac year you were born in. Head position people experience the year's energy most directly and early. Middle position people experience a balanced, steady year. Tail position people often see results and conclusions emerge, with energy building toward the next cycle.

yearPillar.title: Year Pillar
yearPillar.body: The Year Pillar (流年) for the current year consists of a Heavenly Stem (天干) and Earthly Branch (地支). Together they encode the dominant elemental energy of the year. The Heavenly Stem governs the first half of the year (Jan–Jun) and the Earthly Branch governs the second half (Jul–Dec). How these interact with your natal chart's pillars determines the year's opportunities and challenges for you personally.

luckSplit.title: First & Second Half Luck
luckSplit.body: The year is split into two distinct energy phases. The first half (January–June) is governed by the Year Pillar's Heavenly Stem, which interacts with your natal chart's Heavenly Stems. The second half (July–December) is governed by the Earthly Branch, which interacts with your natal chart's Earthly Branches. Each half activates different Ten God relationships, creating different themes and opportunities.

lifeDomains.title: Life Domains
lifeDomains.body: The six life domains — Career, Wealth, Relationship, Health, Study, and Talent — each receive a different level of elemental activation from the year's or month's energy. The trend (Rising, Steady, or Caution) indicates whether this domain is being supported or challenged. Career and Study are available to all users. Wealth, Relationship, and Health insights are available to Premium members, as they require deeper chart analysis.

monthlyPredictions.title: Monthly Predictions
monthlyPredictions.body: Each month carries its own elemental energy through its Monthly Pillar (流月), which interacts with your natal chart in a unique way. The line chart shows the relative luck score for each month across the year. Tap any point on the chart to read the detailed prediction for that month, including the elemental interaction and what areas of life are most affected.

specialStars.title: Special Stars
specialStars.body: Special Stars are rare elemental configurations that appear when specific Heavenly Stems or Earthly Branches in the current year align with your natal chart. Positive stars — such as the Wisdom Star (文昌) or Romance Star (桃花) — bring enhanced opportunities in their respective areas. Challenging stars signal periods requiring extra awareness and preparation. Premium members receive the full impact analysis for each star.

protection.title: Protection Strategy
protection.body: A personalised strategy to protect your energy and mitigate challenging elemental influences during this period. Based on your Day Master's element and the current year's or month's elemental interactions, this section recommends specific actions, directions, colours, or practices to strengthen your favourable elements and reduce the impact of unfavourable ones.

luckAvoid.title: Luck & Avoid
luckAvoid.body: A curated summary of the activities, directions, choices, and behaviours most aligned with this period's energy (Luck) and those best avoided (Avoid). These are derived from the elemental interactions between the current pillar and your natal chart. Following the Luck suggestions amplifies positive energy; heeding the Avoid list helps you sidestep unnecessary friction and setbacks.

luckPillarTimeline.title: Luck Pillar Timeline
luckPillarTimeline.body: Your personal timeline of 10-year Luck Pillars (大運) from birth. Each pillar activates a new Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch, shaping the dominant themes, opportunities, and challenges of that decade. The current active pillar is highlighted. Understanding your Luck Pillar timeline helps you see the long arc of your life's energy and make decisions aligned with your current decade's dominant theme.

todayPhase.title: Today's Phase
todayPhase.body: The Day Pillar (日柱) shows today's Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch. Together they determine the elemental energy of the day. The Ten God relationship between today's Heavenly Stem and your Day Master reveals how today's energy interacts with your personal chart — whether it supports, challenges, or neutralises your natural tendencies.

today.title: Today
today.body: Your personalised daily reading based on the interaction between today's Day Pillar and your natal chart. The lucky symbol and message are derived from the Ten God relationship and the day's elemental balance. Use this as a daily intention-setter to align your actions with the day's energy.

luck.title: Luck
luck.body: Your daily luck rating is calculated from the elemental interaction between today's Day Pillar and your natal chart. A high score indicates strong elemental support — a good day for important decisions and new initiatives. A lower score suggests more friction — a better day for reflection, preparation, and routine tasks rather than major moves.

luckPillar.title: Luck Pillar
luckPillar.body: Your current 10-year Luck Pillar (大運) is the major cycle you are currently experiencing. Each Luck Pillar activates a Heavenly Stem (governing the first 5 years) and an Earthly Branch (governing the second 5 years). The Luck Pillar sets the backdrop for all annual and monthly energies — it is the decade-level context within which shorter cycles play out.

baziChart.title: BaZi Chart
baziChart.body: Your BaZi chart (八字命盤) is a map of the elemental energies present at the moment of your birth, encoded in four pillars: Year, Month, Day, and Hour. Each pillar has a Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch, giving eight characters in total. The interactions between these eight characters — through the Five Elements and Ten Gods — reveal your personality, strengths, challenges, and life themes.
